hash_algorithm: sha256(path + NUL + content + NUL), sorted by path
local_overlays: .agents/skills/filesystem-context/SKILL.md: route learning to gitignored reviewed memory
.agents/skills/hosted-agents/SKILL.md: prohibit automatic execution of unsafe examples
execution_policy: SKILL.md guidance is routable; bundled scripts and references are examples and are never auto-executed
